Back to Recipes

Quinoa Jambalaya

Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp Olive Oil (virgen extra)
  • 1 Onion (diced)
  • 2 Garlic Cloves (minced)
  • 1/2 Red Pepper (chopped)
  • 1/2 Green pepper (chopped)
  • 1 Carrot (diced)
  • 400g Tomatoes (canned)
  • 2 Tbsp Soy Sauce
  • 2 Tsp Oregano (dried)
  • 1 Tsp Thyme (dried)
  • 1 Tsp Garlic Powder
  • 1 Tsp Onion Powder
  • 1 Tsp Ground Cumin
  • 1 Tsp Sweet Paprika
  • 1/8 Tsp Ground Black Pepper
  • 1/8 Tsp Cayenne Powder
  • 400g Quinoa
  • 750 ml Vegetable Broth
  • 400g Chickpeas (cooked)
  • 400g Red Beans (cooked)
  • Parsley (chopped)

Instructions

  1. Heat oil in a wok and add onion, garlic, pepper and carrot. Cook for 5 minutes.
  2. Add tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
  3. Add soy sauce, spices, quinoa and vegetable broth. Cook until the quinoa is done.
  4. Add chickpeas, lentils and parsley and cook for 2 minutes.

Adapted from danzadefogones.com
